subcodes.first_line: Convey, with utmost eagerness on my behalf, to Jinab-i-Aqa Mírzá Ḥusayn Khán-i-Burújirdí, that just as the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جناب آقا میرزا حسین خان بروجردیرا از قبل من نهایت اشتیاق ابلاغ نما که چون دل
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
